title: Implementation Plan — Proposal 0001 (Harness Feedback Ingestion)
summary: Task-by-task engineering execution plan for adding opt-in harness bridge.json manifest ingestion to sinfonia-bridge, with a security test matrix and release plan.
scope: bridge.json manifest model and version gate
notes: Numbered filename but lives in docs/proposals/ (not adr/) and Status is 'Draft / Ready for review', so not a locked ADR. Competing DOC vs SPEC signals: contains a Rust trait snippet, config-key list, and a security matrix (SPEC-like), but the dominant nature is a build/execution plan that explicitly defers formal spec text to docs/SPEC.md §11.6.13 (Task 8). Classified DOC (planning context); the requirements live in the companion proposal it references.
